label: PrimeNG
description: PrimeNG component library with the Aura theme preset. No CLI schematic exists for PrimeNG — installed and wired manually.
knownIssues: primeng@21.1.9's peerDependencies require @angular/core@^21.0.7 — a caret range, meaning v21.x only, not v22+. Verified against the live npm registry. Now hard-enforced via minAngularMajor/maxAngularMajor (generate.js refuses this combination outside Angular 21), not just a warning. Re-verify primeng's current peer range before assuming this window is still exactly v21-only.
